title: 3D Trial Chambers
description: Simple pack that adds 3D models for blocks and items found in Trial Chambers
body:
**3D Trial Chambers** adds 3D visual style to the trial chambers blocks (Trial Spawners and Vaults)

![Blocks and Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pwbsqXXh/images/9f6812017d84a6fba9bba3b29ed6356dc4b4ea83.png)

**I Recomended using this texture pack with other 3D texture pack**

**Optifine is not needed by this pack**

See gallery tab for more info and images.

Edit: Wow, This thing has 37k downloads in day I am writing this, Thank you all <3. Fr I made this in like 30 minutes (without updates) and it is the most popular thing on my Modrinth. Next to Golden Key with 3k downloads that I made in month lol.
